gates.name: label_dir_outside_repo
gates.reason: Crypto proxy label packets must stay outside the repo.

gates.name: research_candidate_present
gates.reason: Feature-model falsification must have a research_candidate_fdr_passed row.

gates.name: conservative_probability_preflight
gates.reason: Calibration status is research_only_conservative_probability_ready; OOS selected rows: 95.

gates.name: all_in_cost_replay
gates.reason: 315 of 315 replay rows have all-in cost.

gates.name: positive_cost_adjusted_replay_rows
gates.reason: 159 replay row(s) are positive after conservative probability and all-in cost.

gates.name: capacity_depth_available
gates.reason: No public depth or validated local order-book depth is attached, so capacity and price impact are unknown.

gates.name: correlation_control_available
gates.reason: 30 cluster(s); largest cluster BTC|range|2026-07-02T02:00Z has 140 row(s). Cluster counts are measured, but covariance/exposure controls are not implemented.

gates.name: decay_survival_available
gates.reason: Decay status is recent_bucket_below_random across 4 bucket(s); requires 3 bucket(s) and 100 independent labels. Recent bucket 2026-07-02T05:00Z accuracy 0.3333333333 (9 labels); cumulative accuracy 0.6 across 95 labels; 3/4 bucket(s) pass >= 0.5.

gates.name: no_usable_ev_sizing_or_execution
gates.reason: Replay remains research-only with zero usable rows and no sizing or execution.

method.calibration_rule: Use the Wilson lower confidence bound of OOS directional accuracy as the conservative selected-side probability. This is a preflight calibration, not a deployed model.
method.capacity_rule: Blocked until public depth or validated local order-book depth exists.
method.correlation_rule: Blocked until within-venue covariance or cluster exposure controls exist.
method.cost_rule: YES cost uses yes_ask; NO cost uses 1 - yes_bid; both pass through the Kalshi execution-cost normalizer with official fee estimates.
method.decay_rule: Blocked until recurring time buckets/regimes show stable OOS survival.
method.independence_rule: Collapse repeated observations by exact contract_ticker; keep earliest decision_time.
method.model_rule: proxy_state_directional_accuracy: above => buy YES, below => buy NO.
method.replay_boundary: Historical paper replay only; no live orders, positions, staking, sizing, or usable edge flags.

next_action.name: kalshi_crypto_proxy_capacity_correlation_decay
next_action.stop_condition: Stop before sizing, execution, account/order paths, or treating positive replay rows as deployable.
next_action.why: A research candidate has conservative cost-adjusted replay rows, but capacity, correlation, and decay gates block any usable edge.
